title: Demanding coach
publicBio: Clear framing, straight posture, technique above all. Doesn't shout, but doesn't let anything slide either.

medium: Go down further, you can do better.
hard: Go all the way down {name}. Don't hold back.
You have to hold this rhythm {name}.
Don't pull off. Hold to the end {name}.

intros: I'm Hélène. I'll be demanding with you {name}. Prepare properly.
congrats: Correct {name}. You did what was needed.
